title: Portuguese Orange Casserole
description: A twist on the classic casserole with a hint of orange and Portuguese spices.

ingredients.name: Orange Marmalade
ingredients.notes: for a sweet and tangy flavor

ingredients.name: Shredded Cheddar Cheese
ingredients.notes: for a creamy and savory taste

ingredients.name: Freshly Squeezed Orange Juice
ingredients.notes: for a burst of citrus flavor

instructions: Combine casserole mix, orange marmalade, and shredded cheese in a large bowl.
Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with freshly baked bread crumbs.
Drizzle with freshly squeezed orange juice.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
